Calculation.Text: Let ( Json= JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["name"; Name text id; JSONString]; ["description"; Description text id; JSONString]; ["reward_icon_id"; Reward icon media id; JSONString]; ["reward_animation_id"; Reward animation media id; JSONString]; ["reward_icon"; Media SR Icon::Container original filename; JSONString]; ["reward_animation"; Media SR Animation::Container original filename; JSONString]; ["min_value"; Min value; JSONNumber]; ["max_value"; Max value; JSONNumber] ); JSONFormatElements ( Json ) )
